Skill Path: Doctor

You mastered the science of conventional medicine.

While developing your skills in Medicine you chose to focus specifically on Doctor, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.sMCpihnBEpx18GBD]{Inoculation}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bkZgWFSFV4cAf5Ot]{Risky Surgery}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}.
